name: Lentil-Carrot Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the carrots until tender. Drain the carrots and mash them coarsely with a potato masher.
2. Add the cooked lentils and remaining ingredients to the mashed carrots. Mix well.
3. Pack the mixture into a well-oiled loaf pan. Decorate the top of the loaf with nut halves, if desired.
4. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes, or until firm and golden brown.
5. Let the loaf stand for about 5 minutes before unmolding it onto a serving platter.
6. Surround the unmolded loaf with sliced ripe tomatoes or other colorful vegetables for an attractive presentation.
7. Serve with the sauce of your choice.
